Toh humne ek endpoint banane ka plan kar rahe hain, jiska naam `/naam` hai. Ab hum isko detailed mein samjhte hain.

Endpoint `/naam` ka kaam kya hoga? Kya yeh OpenWeatherMap API ko call karega aur city ke liye weather data fetch karega? 

Agar haan, toh ismein humein city ka naam parameter ke roop mein dena hoga. Phir iska logic kya hoga? Kya hum temperature ko Celsius mein convert karenge aur humidity bhi fetch karenge? 

Aur agar koi error aata hai, toh hum usko kaise handle karenge? Kya hum error message return karenge ya kuch aur? 

Tumhara kya khayal hai?
haan city name parameter temperature Celsius humidity weather condition OpenWeatherMap API key env se error handle karo

Toh humne ek endpoint banane ka plan kar liya hai, jiska naam `/naam` hai. Ab hum isko detailed mein samjhte hain.

Endpoint `/naam` ka kaam yeh hoga ki yeh OpenWeatherMap API ko call karega aur city ke liye weather data fetch karega. Iss endpoint ko city ka naam parameter ke roop mein dena hoga.

Ismein humein temperature ko Celsius mein convert karna hoga, humidity bhi fetch karna hoga, aur weather condition bhi fetch karna hoga.

OpenWeatherMap API key hum environment variable (env) se fetch karenge, taaki humare API key safe rahein.

Ab error handling ke liye, hum kuch cases samjhte hain:

* Agar city ka naam invalid hai, toh hum error message return karenge.
* Agar OpenWeatherMap API key invalid hai, toh hum error message return karenge.
* Agar OpenWeatherMap API se data fetch karne mein error aata hai, toh hum error message return karenge.
* Agar koi aur error aata hai, toh hum error message return karenge.

Tumhara kya khayal hai? Kya humne sab cases cover kiye hain? 

Parameter ki list kuch iss prakaar hogi:
- City name (string)
- API key (env se)

Logic kuch iss prakaar hogi:
- OpenWeatherMap API ko call karo
- City ka naam aur API key do
- Temperature ko Celsius mein convert karo
- Humidity aur weather condition fetch karo

Edge cases kuch iss prakaar hain:
- Invalid city name
- Invalid API key
- OpenWeatherMap API se data fetch karne mein error

PLAN READY!
